subject: Re:
body:
sorry , you misunderstood ,, the whole trip is on me hotel ,transport food fun,, you're great,, have fun,, just ask bella to pay


----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, March 8, 2007 6:31:57 AM
Subject: 


Hi,
 Jeffrey I feel uncomfortable asking you but if I want to go see Simona then I have no choice... I don't have the money to purchase my flight so I was wondering if I could please use my work visa and then pay it back (in April). Simona said we need to get a hotel in Madrid so on top of my flight I don't have enough.  I'm really sorry if I'm bothering you.
                       Dana
